sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n87804" key="proklhsi/a" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">προ-κλησία</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, perh. <sense id="n87804.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <xr opt="n" TEIform="xr"> <lbl opt="n" TEIform="lbl">=</lbl> <ref targOrder="U" lang="greek" TEIform="ref">προθεσμία</ref></xr>, <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">Docum.Ant.dell' Africa Italiana</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0018.tlg001:1:86" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.86</biblScope> </bibl> (Cyrene, <date TEIform="date">iv B.C.</date>).</sense> </entryFree>
